project: Model Atlas — Basic Token Glossary Page
description: Publish the Phase 1 token glossary page at /docs/glossary/token using the message-key, registry-backed, colocated asset/message pattern so readers can open the page, find it on the glossary index, and discover it through search by title or body text—without expanding into Phase 2 glossary coverage.

context.customerAsk: Phase 1: implement one basic glossary page for token using the same message-key, registry-backed, colocated asset/message pattern. Ensure it renders at its docs route, appears in the glossary index, and is searchable by title/body text without adding broader Phase 2 glossary coverage.
context.problem: Baseline colocated messages, assets, and a concept.token registry record exist, but readers cannot open /docs/glossary/token, browse to Token on the glossary index, or search for terms like subword token. Phase 1 requires a working glossary route alongside the sample module page.
context.solution: Publish page.mdx following the concept template with kind glossary and registryId concept.token, add the graph.token-concept-map registry record, register the page in Fumadocs, expose glossary discovery and search document builders for the token page, and render registry-backed tags and minimal related documents in the standard docs shell.

acceptanceCriteria: A reader can open /docs/glossary/token and see a complete glossary reference inside the standard docs shell with message-key-driven copy from colocated messages/en.json.
The conceptMap asset renders with message-backed alt/caption text; broken asset or graph references fail validation or development builds clearly.
The glossary index lists Token with summary and a link to /docs/glossary/token.
Search for token, subword token, or distinctive body phrases returns the token glossary page in relevant results.
Tag pills on the page link to working tag destinations for tags on concept.token.
Only the token glossary page is added—no Phase 2 foundational glossary terms.
Typecheck, lint, and tests pass via make ci (or equivalent project CI command).

userStories.title: Publish and render the token glossary page
userStories.description: As a reader learning ML fundamentals, I want a token glossary page at its docs route so I can understand what a token is before reading module pages like grouped-query attention.
acceptanceCriteria: src/content/docs/glossary/token/page.mdx exists with kind glossary, registryId concept.token, messageNamespace local, assetNamespace local, and status published.
MDX follows docs/templates/concept.mdx using T, Section, TagPillList, DerivedRelatedDocs, RelatedDocs, and CitationList with no raw user-visible prose.
Navigating to /docs/glossary/token returns HTTP 200 with the standard docs shell in a local dev build.
Title, problemStatement, and coreIdea render from colocated messages below the page heading.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Resolve and render the token concept map asset
userStories.description: As a reader, I want a visual concept map on the token page so I can see how text becomes token IDs before the transformer stack.
acceptanceCriteria: graph.token-concept-map registry record exists and satisfies Phase 1 graph schema requirements referenced by assets.json.
ConceptMap or equivalent component renders the conceptMap asset ID with alt text and caption resolved from message keys.
Invalid or missing graph or asset references fail make validate-data or surface a clear development error.
Automated tests cover asset resolution for the token page conceptMap graph asset.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Register token in the Fumadocs docs tree
userStories.description: As a reader browsing the docs sidebar, I want the token glossary page registered in navigation so I can reach it without typing the URL.
acceptanceCriteria: Fumadocs meta.json or equivalent source config includes the token glossary page under the glossary section.
Page frontmatter title and description align with resolved message keys for metadata where Fumadocs reads frontmatter.
Internal links to /docs/glossary/token from navigation resolve without 404 in the test harness.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Expose token for glossary index listing
userStories.description: As a reader on the glossary index, I want Token listed with its summary so I can browse defined terms in one place.
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/content exposes a helper such as listPublishedGlossaryPages returning published glossary pages with resolved title, summary, slug, and URL.
The helper includes the token page when status is published and returns entries sorted alphabetically by title.
Glossary index route renders Token with summary linking to /docs/glossary/token, or an automated test asserts the helper output includes the token entry with expected title and URL.
When no glossary pages exist, the helper returns an empty list without throwing.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Index token page for search by title and body text
userStories.description: As a reader using site search, I want to find the token glossary by typing the term or phrases from its explanation.
acceptanceCriteria: Search document builder produces a normalized document for the token glossary page including title, description, resolved body text, headings, aliases, tags, kind glossary, and URL /docs/glossary/token.
Querying token or subword token against the built index returns the token glossary page among relevant results in automated tests.
Querying a distinctive body phrase from messages such as 128k context returns the token page in relevant results.
Search facets use registry fields; body text is not scraped from raw MDX prose.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Registry-backed tags and minimal related documents on token page
userStories.description: As a reader exploring related topics, I want tag pills and nearby related docs on the token page so I can jump to attention-tagged resources without hand-maintained link lists.
acceptanceCriteria: TagPillList renders tags from concept.token as keyboard-focusable links to /tags/<slug> or equivalent tag-filter URLs.
Tag pills use restrained monochrome styling per docs/site-fundamentals.md.
DerivedRelatedDocs renders shared-tags and/or same-concept-type groups when matching registry records exist; empty groups are omitted.
CitationList renders without broken markup when citationIds is empty.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
